channel.title: Stereokit on Carter Watson
channel.description: Recent content in Stereokit on Carter Watson

item.title: Mixed Reality Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Responsibilities Used Blazor, C#, .NET, and Stereokit to create a web app and a mixed reality application for the microsoft hololens Experienced the process of managing a program through scrum and agile development Integrating physics engine with existing infrastructure as a student scholar project
